name: Alex Rivera
title: Node.js Developer
profile: Node.js developer with practical experience building APIs, dashboards, data workflows, and document automation tools. Comfortable across TypeScript, databases, cloud deployment, and test automation, with a focus on maintainable systems and reliable delivery.

experience.title: Node.js Developer
experience.overview: Worked in a product engineering team across TypeScript frontends, Node.js services, PostgreSQL databases, and cloud-hosted document workflows.
bullets: Built a TypeScript export service that generated PDF and DOCX reports from structured JSON data.
Reduced manual document preparation time by 45 percent through reusable templates and validation checks.
Improved API reliability by adding focused integration tests and clearer error handling.
Reviewed pull requests, documented runbooks, and mentored new contributors on project conventions.

projects.name: Sample CV Generator
bullets: Built a sample-first CV generator that renders ATS and polished outputs from one structured data file.
Added export smoke tests that inspect generated PDF and DOCX files for expected public-safe content.
